app-nav: padding: 52px 16px 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; position: relative; z-index: 2;
np-label: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-secondary);
scroll-body: flex: 1; padding: 16px; position: relative; z-index: 2; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
album-art: width: 240px; height: 240px; border-radius: 6px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #A06CC9 0%, #6E2E8F 50%, #3B1555 100%); box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6); margin-bottom: 32px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
track-title: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.3px; margin-bottom: 4px; text-align: center;
track-artist: font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 24px; text-align: center;
scrubber-track: height: 4px; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--text-tertiary); position: relative;
scrubber-fill: height: 100%; width: 60%; background: var(--text); border-radius: 2px; position: relative;
scrubber-thumb: position: absolute; right: -6px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--text);
scrubber-times: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 6px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);
actions: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; margin-top: 8px;
play-btn: width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(29,185,84,0.35);
tab-bar: height: 60px; background: rgba(18,18,18,0.92); backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; padding: 4px 8px 14px; border-top: 0.5px solid var(--divider);
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
